race.comment: Pike sticks with FEY KING (10), and he's another winning chance for the top hoop. Led beaten 1.6L at Belmont over this distance and has plenty of scope for further improvement. Uses the inside barrier and fitter he will take plenty of passing. DEFENDING (3) also likes to run along and is busting to win. There's been nothing it his last two at a mile and he benefits from a 2kg claim. Go close. JUST LEROY (6) is on an upward spiral. Placed here first-up and then came back beaten a neck. Will position forward from an inside barrier and is ready for the 1600m. Pay to follow up. BOAB BOY (4) peaks and is a better chance than the form line suggests. He's won twice this trip and drawn wide may take a sit today. Keeps the 2kg claim and should be around the mark.
